name: canshare-tnm8-gist-gastric-omental-stage-group
title: NZ AJCC (8th edition) gastrointestinal stromal tumour gastric and/or omental stage group
description: The stage groups that describe how far a gastrointestinal stromal tumour (GIST) gastric and/or omental has grown and spread, using chapter 43.1 of the AJCC cancer staging manual (8th edition).
